emails.subject: FW: Carr Futures
emails.body: Justin/Edmond, We need to prepare an Enron Corp. Guaranty for Carr Futures. I have been told that ECTRIC has a futures agreement with Carr. Can someone in your office verify this and let me know the date of the agreement? Stephanie Panus Senior Legal Specialist Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3803C Houston, Texas 77002 ph: 713.345.3249 fax: 713.646.3490 email: stephanie.panus@enron.com
